---
title: "Data Verification"
format: html
---

## Gamelogs

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
wnba_gl <- read_rds(here::here("data/wnba_gl.rds"))
```

```{r}
wnba_gl |>
  group_by(season_id) |>
  summarize(
    num_teams = n_distinct(TEAM_ID),
    num_games = n(),
    num_wins = sum(win_flag, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_wpct = sum(win_flag, na.rm = TRUE) / n(),
    mean_rolling_wins = mean(rolling_wins_44),
    mean_attendance = mean(attendance, na.rm = TRUE),
    num_cc = sum(is_cc, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```

## Elo ratings

```{r}
library(elo)

wnba_gl <- wnba_gl |>
  mutate(opp_score = parse_number(PTS) - parse_number(PLUS_MINUS))

elo <- elo.run(score(PTS, opp_score) ~ TEAM_ID + opponent, data = wnba_gl, k = 20) |>
  as.data.frame()

wnba_gl <- bind_cols(wnba_gl, select(elo, contains("elo")))
```

## Active franchises

```{r}
franchises <- wnba_gl |>
  group_by(TEAM_ID) |>
  summarize(
    num_games = n(),
    team_names = paste(unique(TEAM_NAME), collapse = "|"),
    season_first = min(season_id),
    season_last = max(season_id),
    name_current = last(TEAM_NAME)
  )

active_teams <- franchises |>
  filter(season_last == 2024)

wnba_gl_active <- wnba_gl |>
  right_join(active_teams, by = join_by(TEAM_ID))
```



```{r}
ggplot(wnba_gl_active, aes(x = rolling_wins_44, color = SEASON_ID)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 22, linetype = 3) +
  geom_density()
```

```{r}
ggplot(wnba_gl_active, aes(x = rolling_wins_44)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 22, linetype = 3) +
  geom_density() +
  facet_wrap(vars(name_current))
```

```{r}
ggplot(wnba_gl_active, aes(y = attendance, x = rolling_wins_44, color = is_cc)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(vars(name_current))
```

```{r}
ggplot(wnba_gl_active, aes(x = game_date, y = attendance, color = factor(is_cc))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(vars(name_current))
```

```{r}
ggplot(wnba_gl_active, aes(x = game_date, y = elo.A, color = factor(is_cc))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(vars(name_current))
```


```{r}
wnba_gl |>
  summarize(cor = cor(elo.A, rolling_wins_44))

ggplot(wnba_gl, aes(x = rolling_wins_44, y = elo.A)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(vars(TEAM_ID))

ggplot(wnba_gl_active, aes(x = elo.A, y = attendance, color = factor(is_cc))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(vars(name_current))

```


## Modeling

```{r}
# Consider this alternative model specification
mod_attendance <- lm(
  log(attendance + 1) ~ elo.A + elo.B + factor(wday(GAME_DATE)) + factor(month(GAME_DATE)) + name_current + season_id + is_cc,
  data = filter(wnba_gl_active, !season_id %in% c(2021))
)

summary(mod_attendance)
anova(mod_attendance)

plot(mod_attendance)
```
